_schema_doc.events: List of district-level regime events. Empty in Sprint 2.22.0a per KICKOFF §5.4 — populated by operational track in Sprint 2.22.0b.

_event_shape.name: <short Arabic description, prepended with ' — ' separator when injected into regime_shift template, e.g., ' — إعلان مشروع X'>
_event_shape.start_date: <ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when event was announced/began>
_event_shape.end_date: <ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when transition window expires; regime_shift trigger fires only between start_date and end_date>
